label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down this problem. We need to determine whether the administrative assistant caused the problem of the receptionist having no pens to take an important message. Let's analyze the situation step by step: 1. The receptionist keeps her desk stocked with pens. 2. The administrative assistants are allowed to take the pens. 3. Faculty members are supposed to buy their own pens. 4. Administrative assistants typically do take the pens. 5. Faculty members also typically take the pens. 6. The receptionist has repeatedly emailed reminders
